name: Dondozo (ヘイラッシャ)
description:
The Big Catfish Pokémon, a Water type.

While swimming in Casseroya Lake, a lake that surrounds the northwest coast of Paldea, a huge, practically prehistoric Dondozo accidentally eats you! You're trapped in its mouth as it decides to stay underwater!
